message:
fix(time): reinsert non-ready timers into correct wheel slot during tick

When drain_expired processes the ready list, timers that are not yet
truly expired (their deadline falls in a future slot due to level
cascading) were previously left in place via index increment (i += 1),
keeping them in the ready vec indefinitely. On each subsequent tick
they would be re-checked and skipped again, growing the ready vec
and degrading tick performance from O(expired) to O(total_pending).

Fix: use swap_remove to extract non-ready entries and reinsert them
into the wheel at their correct slot via insert_entry(). After
processing, merge any timers that became ready during reinsertion
(insert_entry may cascade timers into the current slot) by appending
the accumulated new ready entries back into the ready vec before
storing it. The ready vec retains its capacity across ticks to
avoid repeated allocation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
